headlines.title: Julián Quiñones anota el primer gol del Mundial para México
headlines.description: El delantero aprovechó una recuperación tras una presión alta para marcar el primer tanto de la Copa del Mundo 2026.

headlines.title: Raúl Jiménez anota el 2-0 con dedicación al cielo
headlines.description: El delantero apareció a segundo palo para rematar frente a la portería. El ex americanista marcó su primer gol en Copas del Mundo.

headlines.title: Trump says deal with Iran will come 'maybe this weekend'
headlines.description: President Trump told reporters a deal with Iran could come "maybe this weekend" and it is his understanding that Iran's leadership has agreed to its terms.

headlines.title: Defense industry leaders to meet with Trump amid missile supply worries, sources say
headlines.description: The president is expected to press the leaders to find ways to swiftly increase production of weaponry for the Pentagon, sources told NBC News.

headlines.title: SpaceX locks in IPO price of $135, making it largest stock debut ever
headlines.description: SpaceX on Thursday set its final IPO price at $135, the last stage in a long-running process to bring Elon Musk’s space and AI conglomerate public.

headlines.title: Trump nominates Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence
headlines.description: The president had named Pulte to hold the Cabinet position temporarily after Tulsi Gabbard resigned from the post.

headlines.title: Data shows just how close these NBA Finals games have been
headlines.description: The Spurs-Knicks games so far have been decided by an average of 4 points. The average margin across NBA Finals series is 11.8 points.

headlines.title: Republicans who pushed Epstein files release see political careers upended by Trump
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has taken political revenge on all four Republicans who signed onto the Epstein files release law.

headlines.title: The inflation surge is hitting businesses, too
headlines.description: Wholesale inflation surged to its highest level since late 2022, as fuel prices pushed higher by the war with Iran ripple across the economy.

headlines.title: A Nebraska immigration raid shut businesses down a year ago. The fallout is ongoing, officials say.
headlines.description: Local businesses have taken a hit as families and workers grapple with the effects of the raid last June on the Glenn Valley Foods meatpacking plant, community members said.

headlines.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
headlines.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

headlines.title: ‘X-Men’ star Tyler Mane’s openness about his breast cancer could reduce stigma, doctors say
headlines.description: “X-Men” actor and former wrestler Tyler Mane’s announcement that he has breast cancer may prompt men to increase their vigilance about a disease closely associated with women, doctors say
